name: Sonic Runner Game
description: Sonic Runner Game is a fast-paced endless running adventure where speed, timing, and reflexes are the key to survival. Dash through exciting levels filled with obstacles, enemies, and power-ups as you race to achieve the highest score possible. Jump, slide, and dodge your way through dynamic environments while collecting rewards and unlocking new challenges. With smooth controls, vibrant visuals, and addictive gameplay, Sonic Runner Game delivers nonstop action for players of all ages. Test your reflexes, beat your personal best, and experience the thrill of speed in this exciting arcade runner game.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play Space Up Arrow X Key Jump Start Game Down Arrow Duck Slide Left Mouse Click Jump Enter Restart Game after Game Over
